citation_and_locator: Tse, Crono Ming San and Andy Chi On Chin. 2015. 粵語「名－量－名」結構的同指用法 [The coreferential use of Cantonese NP-Classifier-NP structure]. 15th Workshop on Cantonese, Linguistic Society of Hong Kong, University of Hong Kong, 11 April 2015; official program abstract pp. 3–4 and author-uploaded presentation
what_it_supports: Direct possessive/coreferential contrast (`你個衰女` versus `你個衰仔`); investigated pronouns, classifiers, and human nouns; mid-20th-century Hong Kong Cantonese corpus design; 109 coreferential versus 449 possessive tokens; human-reference, argument/vocative, discourse-marker, repeated-pronoun, and negative-affect diagnostics.
limit: Conference presentation lacks a full archival methods article; historical film data do not establish present-day productivity, categorical diagnostics, prosody, or regional generality, and exact token annotations were not recovered.
